# VantaDB

> VantaDB is an embedded vector database written in Rust, focused on long-term memory for AI agents.

## Docs
- docs/architecture/ARCHITECTURE.md
- docs/operations/CONFIGURATION.md
- docs/operations/DURABILITY_GUARANTEES.md
- docs/Backlog.md

## API
- docs/api/EMBEDDED_SDK.md
- docs/api/HTTP_API.md
- docs/api/MCP.md
- docs/api/PYTHON_SDK.md
- docs/api/TS_SDK.md

## Quick Start
### Python
```python
from vantadb import VantaEmbedded

db = VantaEmbedded(path="./memory")
db.put("key1", [0.1, 0.2, 0.3], {"source": "chat"})
results = db.search([0.1, 0.2, 0.3], top_k=5)
```

### Rust
```rust
use vantadb::VantaEmbedded;

let db = VantaEmbedded::new("./memory");
db.put("key1", &[0.1, 0.2, 0.3], None).await;
let results = db.search(&[0.1, 0.2, 0.3], 5).await;
```

### CLI
```bash
vanta-cli put --namespace default --key hello --vector "[0.1, 0.2, 0.3]"
vanta-cli search --namespace default --query "[0.1, 0.2, 0.3]"
```

### MCP Server
```bash
vanta-cli mcp  # Starts MCP server for AI agent integration
```

## Features
- HNSW vector index with CPIndex (DashMap + xxHash + parking_lot)
- 3 quantization schemes: RaBitQ (1-bit), TurboQuant (3-bit), SQ8 (8-bit)
- QuantizationGovernor: auto f32-to-SQ8 based on access frequency
- ShardedWAL: per-shard sequential recovery mechanism
- SIMD distance kernels: AVX-512 + portable f32x8
- MemoryGovernor: watermark-based memory eviction
- 3 backends: Fjall (default), RocksDB (optional), InMemory
- 6 SDKs: Python, TypeScript, Rust, WASM, MCP, REST
- CLI with 33+ commands and shell completions
- OpenTelemetry integration (OTLP + Prometheus)
- FilterBitset multi-tenant filtering
- RBAC (enterprise crate)

## Integration Ecosystem
- Python SDK: pip install vantadb-py
- TypeScript SDK: npm install vantadb
- Rust SDK: cargo add vantadb
- LangChain adapter: langchain-vantadb (coming to PyPI)
- LlamaIndex adapter: llama-index-vector-stores-vantadb (coming to PyPI)

## Performance
- HNSW M=32, ef_construct=400, ef_search=100
- Batch insert with single lock acquisition
- Zero-copy mmap vector store with BFS layout
- LRU cache for hot nodes
- Release profile: thin LTO, opt-level=3

## Project Status
- Version: 0.2.0
- Pre-release, Phase 3 pre-launch (~95%)
- License: Apache 2.0
- Repository: https://github.com/ness-e/Vantadb
